# Robots.txt for Zion Tech Group
# Updated: October 1, 2025

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Allow all major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

# Disallow crawling of admin, API, and temp areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /temp/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.log$

# Allow crawling of content
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /case-studies/
Allow: /services/
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap-blog.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap-case-studies.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap-services.xml

# Crawl delay (polite)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /
